question_text:
Integer to English Words

Convert a non-negative integer $num$ to its English words representation.
explanation: Divide the number into groups of three digits (Billion, Million, Thousand). For each group, convert the 3-digit number to words using predefined lists for ones, teens, and tens.

test_cases.expected_output: "One Million Two Hundred Thirty Four Thousand Five Hundred Sixty Seven"
"One Billion Two Hundred Thirty Four Million Five Hundred Sixty Seven Thousand Eight Hundred Ninety One"
